rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Fin. Code §201.103, which governs appointment of agents for service of process by Texas financial institutions.
quote: Sec. 201.103. APPOINTMENT OF AGENT TO RECEIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this financial institution service-of-process statute.
